responsibilities: Matching loop for pending orders and TP/SL execution
AI signal loop for strategy evaluation
AI trade manager loop for dynamic position management

components.pipeline: Handles model routing, fail-fast degradation, and LLM budget protection
components.local_fallback: Deterministic engine used when all LLMs are rate-limited

components.dynamic_levels: Adjusts TP based on health, adjusts SL based on R-multiples and trailing regimes
components.exit_intelligence: Aggregates technical anomalies into an exit confidence score
components.health_scorer: Computes real-time positional health based on consecutive adverse candles and momentum

components.vol_target: Normalizes position size against a 1.5% target daily volatility
components.drawdown_gate: Scales down exposure when equity dips below peak high-water mark

execution_flow.step_2: Calculate Shared Indicators (EMA, RSI, ATR, etc.)
execution_flow.step_4: Fuse Strategies (cluster by Family, output StrategySnapshot)
execution_flow.step_7: Execute Atomic Prisma Transaction (Reserve Margin, Open Position)
execution_flow.step_9: Dynamic SL/TP Adjustments or Early AI Exit
execution_flow.step_10: Close Position and Return PnL to Wallet
